problem_statement: Readiness and deployment surfaces can carry accepted-risk notes, but the control plane lacks a schema-backed review packet that keeps waiver handling explicit, expiring, approval-bound, and separated from deployment authority.
success_criteria: ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket binds source readiness evidence, target artifact, UAO ref, review chain, expiry policy, compensating controls, required evidence refs, and blocked reason refs
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket blocks waiver grant, readiness claims, deployment authority, runtime promotion, publication, terminal closure, and success claims
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket rejects missing evidence refs, inactive controls, expired or overlong waiver windows, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: waiver_granted remains false in the Foundation example
readiness_claim_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
deployment_authority_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
Phi_gov authorization remains absent until future evidence exists
operator approval remains absent until future evidence exists
accepted risk ref remains absent until future evidence exists
expiry remains explicit and renewal requires operator approval
